UpdateEniEnterpriseSecurityGroup.eniId: The ID of the elastic network interface
UpdateEniEnterpriseSecurityGroup.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
UpdateEniEnterpriseSecurityGroup.enterpriseSecurityGroupIds: The list of enterprise security group IDs
